final:
module shift_register_4bit
(
    input clk,
    input load,
    input [3:0] data,
    output reg [3:0] q
);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (load) begin
        q <= data;
    end else begin
        q <= {q[2:0], 1'b0};
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      q <= {q[3], q[2:0], 1'b1};
    end
  end

endmodule
